active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Replay all frozen, prior-evidence, provenance, chronology, and raw hashes.
Replay the accepted balanced schedule, stationarity bands, allocation aggregate, matched zeros, and minimum signals.
Require pending independent validation and no release-readiness claim.
Check every candidate-to-baseline row ratio against 1.05.
Require 0/0/1 in every event-loop-turn retained-control observation.
Aggregate lifecycle ownership, cleanup, business-state, and post-close rejection counters.
Replay every lifecycle owner and session post-close assertion.
Confirm this unit contains only the three lifecycle rows and no 47-row benchmark output.
Require the exact baseline plus only the frozen V1+V2+V3 scope.ts patch, with V4 and AbortController excluded.
Stop after one observation without commit, push, merge, release, publish, deploy, or production contact.

payload.claim_boundary: Worker evidence remains pending independent validation. No product improvement, release-readiness, or acceptance claim follows from this checkpoint.
payload.decision_target: Determine whether V1+V2+V3 meets the frozen lifecycle performance target while excluding V4 and AbortController changes.

private activeIterators.baseline: private activeIterators = new Set<AsyncIterator<unknown, unknown, unknown>>()
private activeIterators.candidate: private activeIterators = new Set<AsyncIterator<unknown, unknown, unknown>>()

payload.required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
